title: Rich Chewy Lazy Sunday Potatoe Bun
description: A rich and chewy potato bun recipe perfect for lazy Sunday mornings, featuring a sugar-free twist to keep it healthy but indulgent.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the Potato Flour and Almond Meal. Add in the Coconut Sugar, Baking Powder, and Salt.
Cut the softened Butter into small cubes and fold them into the dry ingredients until just combined, ensuring not to overmix to maintain moisture.
Gently stir in the beaten Eggs until a dough forms. The mixture will be soft and sticky.
Transfer the dough onto a lightly floured surface. Knead gently for about 2-3 minutes until smooth.
Lightly dust your hands with flour, and divide the dough into 8 equal parts. Roll each part into a ball and place on a lined baking sheet.
Using an egg wash (1 beaten egg mixed with 1 tablespoon water), lightly brush the tops of the buns for extra shine. Optionally, pipe Vegan Butter around the edges to enhance flavor and appearance.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown. The center should have an internal temperature of at least 160°F (70°C).
Allow buns to cool slightly before serving. Serve warm with your favorite toppings like a dollop of vegan butter and fresh berries.
For best results, let the Potatoe Buns sit for a few minutes after baking to develop their texture.
